events.description: Appointment with Dr. Jennifer Smith, MD, Internal Medicine. Date: Tuesday, February 3, 2026. Time: 10:30 AM to 11:00 AM. Location: Valley Medical Center, 1500 Medical Plaza Drive, Suite 200, San Jose, CA 95128. Please arrive 15 minutes early to complete paperwork. Bring your insurance card and a valid photo ID. To reschedule or cancel, call (408) 555-1234 at least 24 hours in advance.
